description.en: Retrieve data from any REST API endpoint using HTTP GET requests. Fetch information from web services, APIs, and HTTP endpoints with customizable query parameters and headers. Perfect for reading data from external services and integrating with third-party APIs.
description.de: Rufe Daten von beliebigen REST-API-Endpunkten mit HTTP GET-Anfragen ab. Hole Informationen von Web-Services, APIs und HTTP-Endpunkten mit anpassbaren Abfrageparametern und Headern. Ideal zum Lesen von Daten externer Services und zur Integration mit Drittanbieter-APIs.
description.es: Retrieve data from any REST API endpoint using HTTP GET requests. Fetch information from web services, APIs, and HTTP endpoints with customizable query parameters and headers. Perfect for reading data from external services and integrating with third-party APIs.
description.fr: Retrieve data from any REST API endpoint using HTTP GET requests. Fetch information from web services, APIs, and HTTP endpoints with customizable query parameters and headers. Perfect for reading data from external services and integrating with third-party APIs.
description.ro: Retrieve data from any REST API endpoint using HTTP GET requests. Fetch information from web services, APIs, and HTTP endpoints with customizable query parameters and headers. Perfect for reading data from external services and integrating with third-party APIs.
description.it: Retrieve data from any REST API endpoint using HTTP GET requests. Fetch information from web services, APIs, and HTTP endpoints with customizable query parameters and headers. Perfect for reading data from external services and integrating with third-party APIs.

description.en: The base URL to make the GET request to (e.g., https://api.example.com/v1/users)
description.de: Die Basis-URL für die GET-Anfrage (z.B. https://api.example.com/v1/users)
description.es: The base URL to make the GET request to (e.g., https://api.example.com/v1/users)
description.fr: The base URL to make the GET request to (e.g., https://api.example.com/v1/users)
description.ro: The base URL to make the GET request to (e.g., https://api.example.com/v1/users)
description.it: The base URL to make the GET request to (e.g., https://api.example.com/v1/users)

description.en: Query parameters as a JSON string (e.g., {"userId": "123", "status": "active"})
description.es: Query parameters as a JSON string (e.g., {"userId": "123", "status": "active"})
description.fr: Query parameters as a JSON string (e.g., {"userId": "123", "status": "active"})
description.ro: Query parameters as a JSON string (e.g., {"userId": "123", "status": "active"})
description.it: Query parameters as a JSON string (e.g., {"userId": "123", "status": "active"})

description.en: Headers as a JSON string (e.g., {"Accept": "application/json", "Authorization": "Bearer token"})
description.es: Headers as a JSON string (e.g., {"Accept": "application/json", "Authorization": "Bearer token"})
description.fr: Headers as a JSON string (e.g., {"Accept": "application/json", "Authorization": "Bearer token"})
